---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

<!-- A clear description of the feature or improvement you're suggesting. -->

## Why would this be useful?

<!-- What problem does it solve, or what does it make easier? -->

## How do you imagine it working?

<!-- Describe how you'd expect to interact with it — where it lives in the app, what it does. Mockups or examples welcome. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Related features, links, or context that might help. -->
